title: Best coffee at home
text: Best purchase. Used every morning for months and still works perfectly. Switched from Chemex Six Cup and the pour spout on this is much better. Sturdy and well made.

title: Handle broke
text: The handle cracked after two weeks of normal use. For a kitchen tool this should hold up better. Returned for a refund. Customer service was a nightmare.

title: Keeps lunch cold
text: Perfect for daycare drop offs. Use it daily and the zipper still works after months. Great for nurses on long shifts who need something cold by lunch break.

title: Sharpened nothing
text: This sharpener did absolutely nothing for my knives. Hard to use and the instructions are useless. I returned it. Way too expensive for the result it produces.

title: Love these bowls
text: Absolutely love this set. Use them for everything from baking to salad prep. Holds up to the dishwasher cycle after months. Worth every penny.

title: App listens to me
text: This purifier has an app that listens to me and tracks me even when the device is off. Privacy is a real concern. I disconnected it from wifi and now most features are gone.

title: Quiet enough for sleep
text: Great for the bedroom. I use this for allergy season and the night mode is whisper quiet. Filter changes are easy. Better than Levoit Compact Mini for my room size.

title: Mediocre
text: It works. It's a pour over. Not a game changer, not a disaster. Feels cheap given the price but it brews coffee fine.

title: Zipper broke immediately
text: Zipper stopped working after three days. Feels flimsy. Returned for refund. Support was unresponsive for over a week.

title: Switched from Pyrex
text: Upgraded from Pyrex Standard Set and these are noticeably lighter. After a year of daily use they still look new. Built to last.
